concerns.text: Abstract contains unresolved internal markers: '[UNRESOLVED-CLAIM: c_433ebbae — status=not_enough_info]' and a broken URL 'https://github.com/opendatalab/CiteVQA (code will be made...)'. These must be removed or resolved before publication.
Section 3.1 (Document Collection) ends with an unresolved marker: '[UNRESOLVED-CLAIM: c_aa9463b7 — status=not_enough_info]'. This breaks the narrative flow and must be addressed.
Section 5.1 (Fine-grained Results) contains a dangling sentence: 'See More Fine-grained Results in Appendix...'. This should be integrated into the paragraph or removed.
Appendix Section 'Limitations & Potential Negative Impacts' has a typo in the label: '\label{appenidx: Limitations}' (missing 'd' in appendix). This will break cross-references.

The abstract's repository URL is malformed: '\url{https://github.com/opendatalab/CiteVQA (code will be made...)}'. The text inside the URL command should not contain spaces or parentheses unless escaped, and the sentence structure is broken.
